title: Emphasize offscreen threat
description: Place specific sounds beyond the frame to make unseen space dramatically active.
solves: Suspense that disappears when the threat is not visible.

title: Clean dialogue clarity
description: Prioritize intelligibility through editorial repair, selective ADR, and restrained mixing.
solves: Story information obscured by noisy production tracks.

title: Build city ambience
description: Layer traffic, rooms, crowds, and distant activity into a location-specific urban bed.
solves: Locations that feel empty or interchangeable.

title: Subjective sound perspective
description: Filter the mix through a character's stress, memory, or attention.
solves: An internal experience that the image alone cannot express.

title: Silence for tension
description: Strip expected ambience before decisive moments so small sounds gain dramatic force.
solves: A sequence whose constant density leaves no room for suspense.

title: Practical location sound
description: Retain textured production sound and real acoustic imperfections where they support authenticity.
solves: A polished mix that has lost the physical character of its locations.
